articles.title: Bangladesh: Thousands gather to pay final respects to Awami League veteran, despite ban
articles.summary: Thousands gathered in Dhaka to honor Awami League veteran Tofail Ahmed, sparking speculation about the party's potential resurgence amidst a ban. This event, coupled with claims of minimal reforms by the interim government and its alignment with certain parties, suggests a possible return for the Awami League.

articles.title: CBSE answer book verification portal active, how to apply and complete Aadhaar authentication steps
articles.summary: CBSE has activated its portal for Class 12 students to apply for verification of issues in scanned answer books and re-evaluation of answers. The facility is open only to candidates who have received photocopies of evaluated answer sheets and will remain available from June 2, 2026, to June 6, 2026.

articles.title: How social media is blurring the line between work and life for Gen Z and turning every post into a professional risk
articles.summary: Gen Z employees face a blurred line between personal and professional lives as social media becomes an extension of the workplace. A Zety report reveals 95% avoid posting opinions due to career risks, with 90% experiencing negative consequences.
